subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O God of Names and Creator of earth and heaven! I bear witness to Thy unity and Thy oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا اله الاسماء و فاطر الارض و السماء اشهد بوحدانیتک و فردانیتک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
